Entries.Name: French Kweebec
Entries.Line: I beg you to understand that I am not doing this on purpose. I am sure that it must be irritant. I would probably be annoyed too, if I was you.

Line.Text: Things like these can be easy to hide until you get a dash of hope. And when that proves to be décevant, as it has been in my case, you are not able to slip into your disguise as easily as before.
